response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video: 00:00-02:18 features VTuber group dancing to 'Star-mine'. 2. 02:18-05:00 features Shiranui Flare performing 'Non-breath oblige'. 3. Searched for 'Non-breath oblige PinocchioP lyrics'. Found full lyrics on lyrics-translate.com. 4. 'Star-mine' lyrics were not found as it appears to be a multi-artist idol song where the exact composer was not explicitly provided on screen. Given the constraints and search results, I will mark this scene with null lyrics.
response.global_summary: A concert performance by a group of VTubers featuring an initial dance and a subsequent solo vocal performance of 'Non-breath oblige'.

scenes.description: A group of VTubers (Momosuzu Nene, Tsunomaki Watame, Shiranui Flare) dance together to a song labeled 'Star-mine'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Momosuzu Nene, Tsunomaki Watame, Shiranui Flare

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare performs a solo vocal song, 'Non-breath oblige'.
